name: Tenma Corporation
summary: Tenma Corporation manufactures and sells plastic products in Japan and internationally. It provides houseware products for use in kitchens, living rooms, and bathrooms; and household products used for interior storage in closets. The company also offers office automation equipment parts, including precision molded items, such as weak electric current parts and plastic molded parts; automobile parts comprising door trims, console boxes, instrument panels, heating cases, bumpers, etc.; and media cases consisting of CD/DVD cases and double cases, as well as CD/DVD/BD trays. In addition, it provides industrial plastic products, including materials for agricultural and marine products, packaging and preservation of food and beverages, and logistics; resin products and frame panels; and construction materials. The company was formerly known as Tenma Plastic Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Tenma Corporation in 1987. Tenma Corporation was founded in 1949 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
